description: How a performed set actually ended (§5.5) — a performed-side fact, orthogonal to setRole (structural position). Mirrors Target.stopCondition.kind (§5.10, see stop-condition-kind.json) where the same concept applies on the performed side, plus performed-only tokens for how a stop was reached in practice. MAY be combined with any setRole token (e.g. a drop-set component taken to failure is `setRole: "drop"` + `terminatedBy: "to_failure"`).

tokens.label: To Technical Failure
tokens.description: Stopped when form broke down (before absolute failure).

tokens.label: To RPE
tokens.description: Stopped at a target RPE (parameterize via the WorkUnit's own effortLoad).

tokens.label: To RIR
tokens.description: Stopped at a target reps-in-reserve (parameterize via the WorkUnit's own effortLoad).

tokens.label: Voluntary Stop
tokens.description: Stopped by choice, short of failure or any target (e.g. fatigue management, discomfort, time pressure).

tokens.label: Time Cap
tokens.description: Stopped because an imposed time limit was reached.

tokens.label: Prescribed Target Met
tokens.description: Stopped because the prescribed count/target was reached (the default, unremarkable case — usually left unstated).

tokens.label: Form Breakdown
tokens.description: Stopped due to loss of technical form, distinct from technical failure under load (e.g. a coach/spotter call).

tokens.label: Equipment Limit
tokens.description: Stopped because equipment capacity/range was exhausted (e.g. out of plates, pin stack limit).

tokens.label: Pain
tokens.description: Stopped due to onset of pain/discomfort (rehab context).
